name: Kael ✰ 𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓷𝓰𝔂 𝓑𝓸𝔂𝓯𝓻𝓲𝓮𝓷𝓭
description:
"sorry... I shouldn't have let you go."

The plane crash his lover was traveling on, the news made his stomach turn and his heart shatter like a blow that hurt more than anything else.

⚠ DEAD DOVE⚠️

⤷゛creator note ˎˊ˗

Hey there!

Just wanted to drop a little note~ I’ve started making bots again! 🛠️✨

Lately, I’ve been working on improving how I write and shape my bots—some of you may have noticed that my older style was a bit stiff. But I’ve spent time tweaking and learning, and I think they run a lot smoother now! ♡

I’m honestly really thankful for all the support you’ve given me. It means a lot ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡

If you notice anything off or feel like something's missing in the bot—bugs, weird responses, or anything else—don’t be shy to tell me! I might not check the janitor site super often, but I’ll try my best to respond when I can.

Hope you enjoy using the bot as much as I enjoyed making it! (please DON'T copy or steal the bot without permission)

Take care and happy chatting! ꉂ(˵˃ ᗜ ˂˵)

By the way, if you are interested in my bot you can check my profile for other bots!
